title: CherryFrostMC-Server-SMP1-FullModpack
description: This my hosted hobby mc server, is a moded smp world... In the future i add plugins and more game mods.
body:
# 🍒 CherryFrostMC-Server-SMP1

Version: 1.21.1 (Fabric)

Authors: SrRivers777 & vettigo281

# Modpack Statistics:

- Total Components: 79
- Functional Mods: 53 (Client-side utilities + Gameplay features)
- Libraries & APIs: 26 (Engine dependencies)

The CherryFrostMC-Server-SMP1 modpack is intended to upgrade the vanilla experience with functional and aesthetic mods. These are my own essential mods for the best vanilla experience. Not quite vanilla—because you can fly—so if you are a builder, have fun and show your best work!

# Mod, Data Packs, Resource Pack, Shaders Listing

(Listing generated by Gemini by Google)

## 🖥️ Client-Side (Visuals, UI & Performance)

These mods are installed on the client only. They improve how the game looks and feels for the player.

### 🚀 Performance & Graphics

- Sodium: Optimized rendering engine (replaces Optifine).
- Iris Shaders: Support for high-performance Shaders.
- Entity Culling: Prevents rendering of entities that are not currently visible to the player.
- FerriteCore: Drastically reduces RAM usage.
- Bobby: Allows you to see beyond the server's render distance.
- Indium: Required for Sodium to render complex block models (like furniture).

### 📊 Interface & Utility

- FancyMenu: Personalized and aesthetic game menus.
- Chat Heads:Show head of user in chat
- Chat Animation [Smooth Chat]: Aesthetic animation for chat
- AppleSkin: Displays food and saturation values on the HUD.
- Better Advancements: Improved advancement screen (full-screen UI).
- Advancement Plaques: RPG-style advancement pop-up notifications.
- Jade (WAILA): Shows information about the block or entity you are looking at.
- Inventory HUD +: Displays inventory, armor status, and active potion effects on the main screen.
- Inventory Profiles Next: Advanced inventory and chest organizer.
- Controlling: Keybind search tool to easily resolve conflicts.
- Mod Menu & Mod Menu Command: Manage and access mod settings in-game.
- WI Zoom: Smooth and highly configurable zoom.
- Xaero's Minimap & World Map: Full map system with waypoints and points of interest.
- XaeroPlus: Performance and visual extensions for Xaero's maps.
- Drippy Loading Screen: Addon for FancyMenu to customize the loading screen.

### 🏗️ Building & Details

- Litematica: Schematic tool for building structures layer by layer.
- SchematicPreview: Preview your schematics before placing them down.
- Traveler's Titles: Displays the biome name on screen when entering a new area.
- Visual Workbench: Items physically remain on the crafting table surface.
- Sound Physics Remastered: Realistic sound processing, echoes, and reverb.
- Subtle Effects: Improved particles and subtle environmental effects.
- Perception: Immersive visual effects.

## 🌍 Gameplay & Server (Synced)

These mods modify mechanics and content. They MUST be installed on both the server and the client.

### 📦 Storage & Tools

- Traveler's Backpack: Functional backpacks with built-in fluid tanks.
- Waystones: Teleportation pillars for fast travel across the world.
- Just Hammers: Hammers that mine in a 3x3 area.
- Veinminer & Veinminer Enchantment: Mine entire ore veins with a single break.
- Wide Mining: Expands area-of-effect mining capabilities.
- Shulker Box Tooltip & Slot: Dedicated Shulker slot and the ability to see contents without opening the box.
- TrashSlot: A dedicated slot to quickly delete unwanted items.
- CustomPlayerModels:Creates skin models in game.

### 🏘️ World & Mechanics

- Another Furniture: A wide variety of vanilla-style furniture.
- Geophilic: Overhauls vanilla biomes using existing blocks for a better look.
- ElevatorMod: Wool blocks that act as quick vertical elevators.
- Darceno's Minecarts & Faster Minecarts: Faster and more functional minecart systems.
- HT's TreeChop: Take down trees chop-by-chop instead of block-by-block.
- Double Doors: Open double doors simultaneously with one click.
- Gravestones: Creates a grave upon death to safely retrieve your items.
- Trade Cycling: Allows you to cycle villager trades easily without breaking the workstation.
- Cobweb: New mechanics for interacting with spider webs.
- EconomyCraft Modified: A economy system for mincraft with a gui shop, it were modified adding by my self via vibecoding the bulk sell option (sell all your inventory)
- Wide Mining: Wide Mining adds an enchantment which allows players to mine a 3x3 area with a single swing of a pickaxe, making mining way faster!
- MC Paint: Datapack that lets you create and place custom paintings in-game
- Tunneling: Tunneling is a strong enchantment that lets you mine huge chunks with one swing, with three levels in the enchantment.
- Faster Minecarts Upgrade: Minecart Upgrade is a Fabric mod that raises the maximum speed minecarts can travel on rails.
- Farm 3x3: Harvest 3x3 areas of crops when holding a hoe!
- Linkart Refabricated: Updated fork of Linkart, a mod that allows you to link your carts together via chains

### 🛡️ Administration & System

- LuckPerms: Advanced permission and rank management system.
- Essential Commands: Utility commands like /home, /back, and /tpa.
- Open Parties and Claims: Protect your land and create player teams.
- Kits: Starter tool sets for new players.
- Styled Chat & Player List: Aesthetic and organized chat and Tab list.
- Lithium: Extreme optimization for server-side logic (TPS).
- Multiworld: Create & Manage Worlds / Dimensions.

## 📚 Libraries & APIs (Dependencies)

Technical components required for the mods above to function correctly.

Fabric API, Architectury API, Balm, Bookshelf, Cardinal Components, Cloth Config, Collective, Fabric Language Kotlin, Forge Config API Port, Fzzy Config, GooeyLibs, Iceberg, libIPN, MaLiLib, Melody, OctoLib, PneumonoCore, Prickle, Puzzles Lib, Searchables, Silk, SuperMartijn642's Core/Config, Text Placeholder API, Trinkets, YUNG's API, Resourceful Config, iCommon API, Common Network.

## 🎨 Shaders & Visuals

Recommended Shaders that support Distant Horizons (DH) for extreme render distances.

- Complementary Reimagined: The recommended default. Stylized cubic aesthetic and - Minecraft-style clouds.
- Bliss Shaders: Best for epic landscapes and realistic fog integration.
- Photon: Ultra-optimized for players needing high FPS.

DH Configuration:

To enable support, go to Video Settings -> Shaders -> Shader Pack Settings -> Compatibility -> Distant Horizons: ON.

## 📦 Resource Pack

I Like Vanilla: Improves original textures while remaining faithful to the base game style.
